items.title: Former FBI director James Comey indicted for second time
items.dek: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey that critics have said encouraged violence against the US president.
items.body: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey that critics have said encouraged violence against the US president.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Woman weaponized a swarm of bees against deputies trying to carry out an eviction
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
items.dek: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.body: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.author: IriLine Desk
